query: Who are the directors of the film "Lahu Ke Do Rang"?
final_answer: The film "Lahu Ke Do Rang" is directed by Mahesh Bhatt, as indicated by the verified claim that it is a 1979 Hindi film by him. However, there is conflicting information regarding the year of release, with some claims suggesting it may have been released in 1974. Due to this uncertainty about the release year, I can confirm Mahesh Bhatt as the director but cannot definitively resolve the conflicting release dates.
